org.exist.dom
Class ProcessingInstructionImpl

java.lang.Object
  org.exist.dom.NodeImpl
      org.exist.dom.ProcessingInstructionImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.w3c.dom.Node, org.w3c.dom.ProcessingInstruction, QNameable
public class ProcessingInstructionImpl
extends NodeImpl
implements org.w3c.dom.ProcessingInstruction

Persistent implementation of a DOM processing-instruction node.

Author:
wolf
